text: The transformer architecture was introduced in the paper Attention Is All You Need by Vaswani et al. in 2017.
Fine-tuning a pretrained language model on domain-specific data can significantly improve performance on downstream tasks.
The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell and plays a central role in energy production through cellular respiration.
Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readability and simplicity.
The French Revolution began in 1789 and fundamentally transformed French society and government.
Gradient descent is an optimization algorithm used to minimize a loss function by iteratively moving in the direction of steepest descent.
Shakespeare wrote approximately 37 plays and 154 sonnets during his lifetime, exploring themes of love, power, jealousy and betrayal.
The human brain contains approximately 86 billion neurons and roughly the same number of non-neuronal cells.
Reinforcement learning is a type of machine learning where an agent learns to make decisions by receiving rewards or penalties for actions.
The Roman Empire at its height covered around 5 million square kilometers and had a population of roughly 70 million people.
Photosynthesis is the process by which green plants and some other organisms use sunlight to synthesize nutrients from carbon dioxide and water.
A neural network consists of layers of interconnected nodes or neurons that process information using connectionist approaches to computation.
In Pride and Prejudice, Jane Austen explores themes of marriage, morality, and misconception through the story of Elizabeth Bennet.
Quantum mechanics describes the behavior of matter and energy at the atomic and subatomic levels, where classical physics no longer applies.
The Industrial Revolution began in Britain in the late 18th century and transformed manufacturing, transportation, and society.
Docker containers package an application and its dependencies together to ensure consistent environments across different computing environments.
Natural language processing is a subfield of linguistics and artificial intelligence concerned with the interactions between computers and human language.
The periodic table organizes chemical elements by their atomic number, electron configuration, and recurring chemical properties.
Homer's Odyssey is an ancient Greek epic poem attributed to Homer that narrates the adventures of Odysseus after the fall of Troy.
The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second and is considered a fundamental constant of nature.
